title: Of One Who Died In Spring
content:
Loosener of springs, he died by thee!
    Softness, not hardness, sent him home;
    He loved thee--and thou mad'st him free
    Of all the place thou comest from!
meaning:
George MacDonald's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Of One Who Died In Spring"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
